case_title: ALICE TSE VS. CHANELLE ROBERTS-NELSON et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY TSE, ALICE AS TO DEFENDANT ROBERTS-NELSON, CHANELLE NELSON, DONALD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-11-2010 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
